title: parsonsia glutinosa
intro: Parsonsia glutinosa, also known as the native New Zealand "Parsonsia" or "Yam Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Parsonsia glutinosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the plant's leaves or bark.
